subject.description: An industry professional (founder or media buyer type).
subject.action: Standing outdoors, looking directly into the camera lens with a 'we need to talk' expression. They are holding up a smartphone that displays a generic, blurry stock chart.

setting.location: The street corner of a busy, modern city center like New York or London.

composition.framing: Centered vertical framing. MUST follow cropping rules: perfect headspace above the hair, no cut flesh, ample breathing room for the chin. Frame covers head and shoulders.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Low depth of field meaning the city background is mostly blurred out.

lighting.color_grading: Realistic, natural tones, documentary film, native-looking UGC.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear in the image: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, artificial lighting, unnatural skin, cut off heads, cut flesh.
